race.comment: ORCHID SKY (11) is a three-start maiden who wound up strongly over the sharp dash at Swan Hill when fresh from a break. Has since won a trial here and expected to go close. ROYAL HERITAGE (4) showed ability in two runs in first campaign. Fitter for two jump-outs, both here, and looks set for a sharp run fresh. SHALASSA (12) was in the market on debut and was solid when fifth in the same race as ORCHID SKY. Nice debut and sure to play a major role. NOT GUILTY (3) was fair here last time over 1000m after a poor getaway. Fitter and can improve sharply. SIXORSEVEN (9) missed the frame on debut last start over 1000m at Bendigo after going forward early. Better for the experience and in the mix.
